title: Client-Sided Crystals
description: Makes Crystal PvP less ping dependant by making End Crystals more client-sided.
body:
# Client-Sided Crystals Client-Sided Crystals is a Fabric mod that allows players to interact with End Crystals client-side independant from ping. This means that players will no longer have junky ping-caused crystal cooldown, making Crystal PvP more fast placed and enjoyable. Note that this mod does not remove any actual delay from crystals, it just lets players interact with crystals faster without having to wait for packets from the server. You and players in your server **can still play** the game if the mod is only installed on either the client or server, but the gameplay will be vanilla. The features only work if the mod is installed on both sides.

##
